ingredients_raw: 100 ml Prosecco,50 ml White Peach Puree
instructions_en: Pour peach puree into the mixing glass with ice, add the Prosecco wine. Stir gently and pour in a chilled flute glass. Note: PUCCINI - Fresh Mandarin Orange Juice; ROSSINI - Fresh Strawberry Puree; TINTORETTO - Fresh Pomegranate Juice.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour peach purée into chilled flute, add sparkling wine. Stir gently.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml Vodka,20 ml Coffee Liqueur
instructions_en: Pour the ingredients into the old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes. Stir gently. Note: WHITE RUSSIAN - Float fresh cream on the top and stir in slowly.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour the ingredients into an old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes. Stir gently.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Vodka,90 ml Tomato Juice,15 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,2 dashes Worcestershire Sauce,Tabasco,Celery Salt,Pepper (Up to taste)
instructions_en: Stir gently all the ingredients in a mixing glass with ice, pour into rocks glass. Note: If requested served with ice, pour into highball glass.
garnish: Celery, Lemon Wedge (Optional)
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Stirring gently, pour all ingredients into highball glass. Garnish.

ingredients.name: Lime cut into small wedges
ingredients.raw: 1 piece Lime cut into small wedges

ingredients_raw: 60 ml Cachaça,1 Lime cut into small wedges,4 Teaspoons White Cane Sugar
instructions_en: Place lime and sugar into a double old fashioned glass and muddle gently. Fill the glass with cracked ice and add Cachaça. Stir gently to involve ingredients. Note: CAIPIROSKA - Instead of Cachaça use Vodka;
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Place lime and sugar into old fashioned glass and muddle (mash the two ingredients together using a muddler or a wooden spoon). Fill the glass with ice and add the Cachaça.

ingredients_raw: 90 ml Chilled Champagne,10 ml Cognac,2 dashes Angostura bitters,Few drops of Grand Marnier (optional),1 sugar cube
instructions_en: Place the sugar cube with 2 dashes of bitters in a large Champagne glass, add the cognac. Pour gently chilled Champagne.
garnish: Garnish with orange zest and maraschino cherry.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Gin,30 ml Cointreau,30 ml Lillet Blanc,30 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,1 dash Absinthe
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice. Shake well and strain in chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with orange zest

ingredients_raw: 40 ml Vodka Citron,15 ml Cointreau,15 ml Fresh Lime Juice,30 ml Cranberry Juice
instructions_en: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well and strain into a large cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with a lemon twist.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Add all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well and double strain into large cocktail glass. Garnish with lime wheel.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml White Rum,120 ml Coca Cola,10 ml Fresh Lime Juice
instructions_en: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.
garnish: Garnish with lime wedge.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Build all ingredients in a Collins glass filled with ice. Garnish with lime wedge.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Gin,15 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,15 ml Sugar Syrup,60 ml Champagne
instructions_en: Pour all the ingredients, except Champagne, into a shaker. Shake well and strain into a Champagne flute. Top up with Champagne. Stir gently.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Combine gin, sugar, and lemon juice in a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake vigorously and strain into a chilled champagne glass. Top up with Champagne. Stir gently.

ingredients_raw: 35 ml Cognac,35 ml Amaretto
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients directly into an old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes. Stir gently.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour all ingredients directly into old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes. Stir gently.

ingredients_raw: 20 ml Galliano,20 ml Triple Sec,20 ml Fresh Orange Juice,10 ml Fresh Cream
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into shaker filled with ice. Shake briskly for few seconds. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Shake with cracked ice. Strain into glass and serve.

ingredients_raw: 20 ml Crème de Cacao (White),20 ml Crème de Menthe (Green),20 ml Fresh Cream
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into shaker filled with ice. Shake briskly for few seconds. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: N/A, optional mint leaf

ingredients_raw: 60 ml Rum,40 ml Grapefruit Juice,15 ml Maraschino Luxardo,15 ml Fresh Lime
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake well and strain into a large cocktail glass.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake.

ingredients_raw: 40 ml Cognac,120 ml Ginger Ale,Dash of Angostura Bitters (optional)
instructions_en: Pour Cognac and ginger ale directly into a highball glass with ice cubes. Stir gently. If preferred, add dashes of Angostura Bitter.
garnish: Garnish with a rind of one lemon spiral.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml Irish Whiskey,120 ml Hot coffee,50 ml Fresh cream (Chilled),1 teaspoon Sugar
instructions_en: Warm black coffee is poured into a pre-heated Irish coffee glass. Whiskey and at least one teaspoon of sugar is added and stirred until dissolved. Fresh thick chilled cream is carefully poured over the back of a spoon held just above the surface of the coffee. The layer of cream will float on the coffee without mixing. Plain sugar can be replaced with sugar syrup
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Heat the coffee, whiskey and sugar; do not boil. Pour into glass and top with cream; serve hot.

ingredients_raw: 90 ml Dry White Wine,10 ml Crème de Cassis
instructions_en: Pour Crème de Cassis into glass, top up with white wine. Note: KIR ROYAL - Use Champagne instead of white wine
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Add the crème de cassis to the bottom of the glass, then top up with wine.

ingredients_raw: 15 ml Vodka,15 ml Tequila,15 ml White rum,15 ml Gin,15 ml Cointreau,30 ml Lemon juice,20 ml Simple syrup,Top with Cola
instructions_en: Add all ingredients into a highball glass filled with ice. Stir gently.
garnish: Lemon Slice (Optional)

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Amber Jamaican Rum,30 ml Martinique Molasses Rhum,15 ml Orange Curacao,15 ml Orgeat Syrup (Almond),30 ml Fresh Lime Juice,7.5 ml Simple Syrup
instructions_en: Add all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake and pour into a double rocks glass or a highball glass. The Martinique molasses rum used by Trader Vic was not an Agricole rum but a type of “rummy” from molasses.
garnish: Garnish with pineapple spear, mint leaves, and lime peel.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml Tequila 100% Agave,20 ml Triple Sec,15 ml Freshly Squeezed Lime Juice
instructions_en: Add all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass
garnish: Half salt rim (Optional)
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Rub the rim of the glass with the lime slice to make the salt stick to it. Take care to moisten only the outer rim and sprinkle the salt on it. The salt should present to the lips of the imbiber and never mix into the cocktail. Shake the other ingredients with ice, then carefully pour into the glass.

ingredients_raw: 75 ml Fresh orange juice,75 ml Prosecco
instructions_en: Pour orange juice into a flute glass and gently pour the sparkling wine. Stir gently. Note: Also known as Buck's Fizz.
garnish: Garnish with an orange twist (optional).
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Ensure both ingredients are well chilled, then mix into the glass. Serve cold.

ingredients_raw: 60 ml Bourbon Whiskey,4 fresh Mint sprigs,1 tsp Powdered Sugar,2 tsp Water
instructions_en: In Julep Stainless Steel Cup gently muddle the mint with sugar and water. Fill the glass with cracked ice, add the Bourbon and stir well until the cup frosts.
garnish: Garnish with a mint sprig.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: In a highball glass gently muddle the mint, sugar and water. Fill the glass with cracked ice, add Bourbon and stir well until the glass is well frosted. Garnish with a mint sprig.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml White Cuban Ron,20 ml Fresh Lime Juice,6 pcs Mint Sprigs,2 tsp White Cane Sugar,Soda Water
instructions_en: Mix mint springs with sugar and lime juice. Add splash of soda water and fill the glass with ice. Pour the rum and top with soda water. Light stir to involve all ingredients.
garnish: Garnish with sprigs of mint and slice of lime.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Muddle mint leaves with sugar and lime juice. Add a splash of soda water and fill the glass with cracked ice. Pour the rum and top with soda water. Garnish and serve with straw.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Smirnoff Vodka,120 ml Ginger Beer,10 ml Fresh lime juice
instructions_en: In a Mule Cup or rocks glass, combine the vodka and ginger beer. Add lime juice and gently stir to involve all ingredients.
garnish: Garnish with a lime slice

ingredients_raw: 50 ml White Rum,30 ml Coconut Cream,50 ml Fresh Pineapple Juice
instructions_en: Blend all the ingredients with ice in an electric blender, pour into a large glass, and serve with straws. Note: Historically a few drops of fresh lime juice were added to taste. 4 slices of fresh pineapple can be used instead of juice
garnish: Garnish with a slice of pineapple with a cocktail cherry.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Mix with crushed ice in blender until smooth. Pour into chilled glass, garnish and serve.

ingredients_raw: 60 ml Pisco,30 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,20 ml Simple Syrup,1 Raw Egg White
instructions_en: Add all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake and strain into a chilled goblet glass.
garnish: Few dashes of Amargo bitters on top as an aromatic garnish.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Vigorously shake and strain contents in a cocktail shaker with ice cubes, then pour into glass and garnish with bitters.

ingredients_raw: 40 ml Vodka,120 ml Cranberry Juice,30 ml Grapefruit Juice
instructions_en: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.
garnish: Garnish with orange zest and cherry
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice. Garnish with lime wedge.

ingredients_raw: 40 ml Vodka,20 ml Peach Schnapps,40 ml Fresh Orange Juice,40 ml Cranberry Juice
instructions_en: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.
garnish: Garnish with a half orange slice.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice. Garnish with orange slice.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Gin,15 ml Cherry liqueur,7.5 ml Cointreau,7.5 ml DOM Bénédictine,120 ml Fresh Pineapple Juice,15 ml Fresh Lime Juice,10 ml Grenadine Syrup,A dash of Angostura bitters
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes. Shake well. Strain into Hurricane glass.
garnish: Garnish with pineapple and maraschino cherry
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes. Shake well. Strain into highball glass. Garnish with pineapple and cocktail cherry.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Tequila,90 ml Fresh Orange Juice,15 ml Grenadine Syrup
instructions_en: Pour tequila and orange juice directly into highball glass filled with ice cubes. Add the grenadine syrup to create chromatic effect (sunrise), do not stir.
garnish: Garnish with half orange slice or an orange zest
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour the tequila and orange juice into glass over ice. Add the grenadine, which will sink to the bottom. Stir gently to create the sunrise effect. Garnish and serve.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Gin,15 ml Vodka,7.5 ml Lillet Blanc
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes. Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Lemon zest

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Jamaican dark rum,45 ml Gold Puerto Rican rum,30 ml Demerara Rum,20 ml Fresh lime juice,15 ml Falernum,15 ml Donn's Mix,1 tsp Grenadine syrup,1 dash Angostura bitters,6 drops Pernod
instructions_en: Add all ingredients into an electric blender with 170 grams of cracked ice. With pulse bottom blend for a few seconds. Serve in a tall tumbler glass. Note: Donn's Mix: 2 parts of fresh yellow grapefruit and 1 part of cinnamon syrup
garnish: Garnish with mint leaves.
instructions_cocktaildb_en:
Blend at high speed for no more than 5 seconds.

Pour into a glass, add ice cubes to fill, then add the garnish.

*Donn’s mix: Bring 3 crushed cinnamon sticks, 1 cup of sugar and 1 cup of water to a boil, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.

Simmer for 2 minutes, then remove from the heat and let sit for at least 2 hours before straining into a clean glass bottle.

Then add 1 part of the syrup and 2 parts of fresh grapefruit juice together.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Gold Rum,15 ml Galliano,60 ml Fresh Pineapple Juice,1 dash Fresh Lime Juice,Top up with Prosecco
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker except the Prosecco, shake well with ice, strain into chilled highball glass filled with ice and top up with Prosecco.
garnish: Pineapple and Cherry, optional mint sprig for additional aroma.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Shake pour ingredients with ice. Strain into glass, top with Sparkling wine.

ingredients_raw: 52.5 ml Dry Gin,2 teaspoons Honey Syrup,22.5 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,22.5 ml Fresh Orange Juice
instructions_en: Stir honey with lemon and orange juices until it dissolves, add gin and shake with ice. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Optionally garnish with a lemon or orange zest.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml Gin,25 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,12.5 ml Sugar Syrup,15 ml Crème de Mûre
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker except the Crème de Mûre, shake well with ice, strain into chilled old fashioned glass filled with crushed ice, then pour the blackberry liqueur (Crème de Mûre) over the top of the drink, in a circular motion.
garnish: Garnish optionally with a lemon slice and blackberries.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Fill glass with crushed ice. Build gin, lemon juice and simple syrup over. Stir, and then pour blackberry liqueur over in a circular fashion to create marbling effect. Garnish with two blackberries and lemon slice.

ingredients_raw: 60 ml Cuban Aguardiente,15 ml Fresh Lime Juice,15 ml Raw Honey,50 ml Water
instructions_en: Mix honey with water and lime juice and spread the mixture on the bottom and sides of the glass. Add cracked ice, and then the rum. End by energetically stirring from bottom to top.
garnish: Lime wedge.

ingredients_raw: 60 ml Goslings Rum,100 ml Ginger Beer
instructions_en: In a highball glass filled with ice pour the ginger beer and top floating with the Rum.
garnish: Garnish with a lime wedge or slice.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml Vodka,30 ml Kahlúa,10 ml Sugar Syrup,1 strong Espresso
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml Fernet Branca,Fill up with Cola
instructions_en: Pour the Fernet Branca into a double old fashioned glass with ice, fill the glass up with Cola. Gently stir.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Vodka,15 ml Raspberry Liqueur,15 ml Fresh Pineapple Juice
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice cubes. Shake well and strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Espadin Mezcal,15 ml Jamaica Overproof White Rum,15 ml Falernum,1 Bar Spoon Maraschino Luxardo,22.5 ml Fresh Lime Juice,15 ml Simple Syrup,Few Drops of Egg White (Optional)
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into the shaker. Shake vigorously with ice. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass, or “on the rocks” in a traditional clay or terracotta mug.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Vodka Citron,20 ml Triple Sec,15 ml Fresh Lemon Juice
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with sugar rim around the glass.

ingredients_raw: 22.5 ml Mezcal,22.5 ml Yellow Chartreuse,22.5 ml Aperol,22.5 ml Fresh Lime Juice
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

ingredients.name: Red wine
ingredients.raw: 15 ml Red wine Shiraz or Malbech

ingredients_raw: 60 ml Rye Whiskey or Bourbon,22.5 ml Simple syrup,30 ml Fresh lemon juice,Few Drops of Egg White,15 ml Red wine (Shiraz or Malbech)
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into the shaker. Shake vigorously with ice. Strain into a chilled rocks glass filled with ice. Float the wine on top.
garnish: Garnish with lemon or orange zest with cherry.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Shake blended whiskey, juice of lemon, and powdered sugar with ice and strain into a whiskey sour glass. Float claret on top. Decorate with the half-slice of lemon and the cherry and serve.

ingredients_raw: 6/8 pcs Mint Leaves,45 ml Aged Rum,22.5 ml Fresh Lime Juice,30 ml Simple Syrup,2 Dashes Angostura Bitters,60 ml Brut Champagne or Prosecco
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker except the wine, shake well with ice, strain into chilled elegant cocktail glass. Top up with the sparkling wine.
garnish: Garnish with mint springs.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml 100% Agave Tequila,5 ml Fresh lime,A pinch of Salt,100 ml Pink Grapefruit Soda
instructions_en: Poor the tequila into a highball glass, squeeze the lime juice. Add ice and salt, fill up pink grapefruit soda. Stir gently.
garnish: Garnish with a slice of lime.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Stir together and serve over ice.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Bourbon Whiskey,30 ml Amaro Nonino,30 ml Aperol,30 ml Fresh Lemon Juice
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

ingredients.name: quarter size Sliced Fresh Ginger
ingredients.raw: 2-3 piece quarter size Sliced Fresh Ginger

ingredients_raw: 60 ml Blended Scotch Whisky,7.5 ml Lagavulin 16 y Whisky,22.5 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,22.5 ml Honey Syrup,2-3 quarter size Sliced Fresh Ginger
instructions_en: Muddle fresh ginger in a shaker and add the remaining ingredients, except for the Islay single malt whiskey. Fill the shaker with ice and shake. Double-strain into a chilled old fashioned glass with ice. Float the single malt whisky on top.
garnish: Garnish with candied ginger.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Shake blended Scotch, lemon juice, honey syrup and ginger syrup with ice. Strain over large ice in chilled rocks glass. Float smoky Scotch on top (be sure to use a smoky Scotch such as an Islay single malt). Garnish with candied ginger.

ingredients_raw: 25 ml Vodka,25 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,15 ml Crème de Cassis,10 ml Sugar syrup,Top up Sparkling wine
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker except the sparkling wine, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled tall tumbler glass filled with ice, and top up with sparkling wine.
garnish: Garnish with blackberries and optionally a lemon slice as well.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour the ingredients into an highball glass, top with Sparkling wine.

ingredients_raw: 60 ml London Dry Gin,30 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,15 ml Simple Syrup,5/6 Mint Leaves,Few Drops of Egg White (Optional)
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, double-strain into chilled cocktail glass. Note: If egg white is used shake vigorously.
garnish: Garnish with mint springs.

ingredients.name: thin Slices Red Chili Pepper
ingredients.raw: 2 piece thin Slices Red Chili Pepper

ingredients_raw: 50 ml Vodka Vanilla,15 ml Elderflower Cordial,15 ml Fresh Lime Juice,10 ml Monin Honey Syrup,2 thin Slices Red Chili Pepper
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, double-strain into chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with a red chili pepper

ingredients_raw: 90 ml Prosecco,60 ml Aperol,Splash of Soda water
instructions_en: Build all ingredients into a wine glass filled with ice. Stir gently. NOTE: There are other versions of the Spritz that use Campari, Cynar or Select instead of Aperol.
garnish: Garnish with a slice of orange.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Cognac or Brandy,30 ml Gin,15 ml Fresh Lime Juice,2 Dashes Angostura Bitters,Top up Ginger beer
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker except the ginger beer, shake well with ice, Pour unstrained into a Collins glass or in the original S. Bastard mug and top up with ginger beer.
garnish: Garnish with mint springs and optionally an orange slice as well.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml Irish Whiskey,25 ml Sweet Red Vermouth,15 ml Green Chartreuse,2 Dashes Angostura Bitters
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with a slice of orange.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Stir over ice. Strain into chilled glass. Cut a wide swath of orange peel, and express the orange oils over the drink. Discard orange twist.

ingredients.name: Agave Syrup
ingredients.direction: 30 ml Agave Syrup (1/2 Water + 1/2 Agave Nectar)
ingredients.raw: 30 ml Agave Syrup 1/2 Water + 1/2 Agave Nectar

ingredients_raw: 60 ml Tequila Agave 100% Reposado,30 ml Fresh Lime Juice (Persiano),30 ml Agave Syrup (1/2 Water + 1/2 Agave Nectar)
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled rocks glass filled with ice.
garnish: Garnish with a lime slice.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Angostura Bitters,30 ml Orgeat Syrup,22.5 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,15 ml Rye Whisky
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

ingredients.name: Honey mix
ingredients.direction: 15 ml Honey mix (replace water with chamomile)
ingredients.raw: 15 ml Honey mix replace water with chamomile

ingredients_raw: 45 ml White Smooth Grappa,22.5 ml Fresh lemon Juice,15 ml Honey mix (replace water with chamomile),15 ml Chamomile cordial,10 ml Egg White (Optional)
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into the shaker. Shake vigorously with ice. Strain into a chilled small tumbler glass filled with ice. Notes: If desired water can be replaced by chamomile infusion in the honey mix.
garnish: Garnish with lemon zest and white grapes.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml White rum,15 ml Galliano,15 ml Triple Sec,15 ml Fresh Lime Juice
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Cognac,30 ml Crème de Cacao (Brown),30 ml Fresh Cream
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes. Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Sprinkle fresh ground nutmeg on top.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Bitter Campari,30 ml Sweet Red Vermouth,A splash of Soda Water
instructions_en: Mix the ingredients directly in an old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes. Add a splash of Soda Water. Stir gently.
garnish: Garnish with half orange slice and a lemon zest.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour the Campari and vermouth over ice into glass, add a splash of soda water and garnish with half orange slice.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Gin,30 ml Apricot Brandy,30 ml Calvados
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes. Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain contents into a cocktail glass.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Gin,15 ml Maraschino Luxardo,15 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,1 Bar Spoon Crème de Violette
instructions_en: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker. Shake with cracked ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Optional Maraschino Cherry.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Add all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well and strain into cocktail glass. Garnish with a cherry.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml White Rum,30 ml Cognac,30 ml Triple Sec,20 ml Fresh Lemon Juice
instructions_en: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker. Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice cubes, shake, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Bourbon or Rye Whiskey,30 ml Bitter Campari,30 ml Sweet Red Vermouth
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with orange zest, optionally a lemon zest.

ingredients_raw: 52.5 ml Brandy,7.5 ml Maraschino Luxardo,1 Bar Spoon Curacao,15 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,1 Bar Spoon Simple Syrup,2 Dashes Aromatic Bitters
instructions_en: Mix together all ingredients with ice cubes in a mixing glass and strain into prepared slim cocktail glass.
garnish: Rub a slice of orange (or lemon) around the rim of the glass and dip it in pulverized white sugar, so that the sugar will adhere to the edge of the glass. Carefully curling place the orange/lemon peel around the inside of the glass.

ingredients_raw: 40 ml Old Tom Gin,10 ml Maraschino Luxardo,10 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,2 Dashes Orange Bitters
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktails shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled rocks glass with ice.
garnish: Garnish with lemon zest and a maraschino cherry.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice cubes. Shake well. Strain into chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon twist and a maraschino cherry. Serve without a straw.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Gin,15 ml Raspberry Syrup,15 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,Few Drops of Egg White
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktails shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Fresh raspberries.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Dry shake ingredients to emulsify, add ice, shake and served straight up.

ingredients_raw: 60 ml White Cuban Ron,20 ml Fresh Lime Juice,2 Bar Spoons Superfine Sugar
instructions_en: In a cocktail shaker add all ingredients. Stir well to dissolve the sugar. Add ice and shake. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice cubes. Shake well. Strain in chilled cocktail glass.

ingredients_raw: 60 ml Gin,10 ml Dry Vermouth
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.
garnish: Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink, or garnish with green olives if requested.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Straight: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain in chilled martini cocktail glass. Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink, or garnish with olive.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Gin,30 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,10 ml Simple Syrup,Splash of Soda Water
instructions_en: Shake all ingredients with ice except soda water. Pour into thin tall Tumbler glass , top with a splash soda water. NOTE: Serve without ice.
garnish: Garnish with a lemon slice, optional lemon zest.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml London Dry Gin,45 ml Sweet Red Vermouth,7.5 ml Fernet Branca
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Orange zest.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Gin,30 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,15 ml Simple Syrup,60 ml Soda Water
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients directly into a highball filled with ice. Stir gently. NOTE: Use ‘Old Tom' Gin for Tom Collins.
garnish: Garnish with a lemon slice and maraschino cherry.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour all ingredients directly into highball glass filled with ice. Stir gently. Garnish. Add a dash of Angostura bitters.

ingredients_raw: 22.5 ml Gin,22.5 ml Green Chartreuse,22.5 ml Maraschino Luxardo,22.5 ml Fresh Lime Juice
instructions_en: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker. Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Shake with ice and strain into a cocktail glass.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml Rye Whiskey,20 ml Sweet Red Vermouth,1 dash Angostura Bitters
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with a cocktail cherry.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Stirred over ice, strained into a chilled glass, garnished, and served up.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml London Dry Gin,45 ml Sweet Red Vermouth,1 Bar Spoon Maraschino Liqueur,2 Dashes Orange Bitters
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Lemon zest.
instructions_cocktaildb_en:
Add all ingredients to a mixing glass and fill with ice.

Stir until chilled, and strain into a chilled coupe glass.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml White Rum,45 ml Fresh Pineapple Juice,7.5 ml Maraschino Luxardo,5 ml Grenadine Syrup
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Dry Gin,45 ml Fresh Orange Juice,1 Table Spoon Absinthe,1 Table Spoon Grenadine Syrup
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Shake well over ice cubes in a shaker, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Gin,30 ml Bitter Campari,30 ml Sweet Red Vermouth
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients directly into a chilled old fashioned glass filled with ice, Stir gently.
garnish: Garnish with a half orange slice.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Stir into glass over ice, garnish and serve.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Bourbon or Rye Whiskey,1 Sugar Cube,Few Dashes Angostura Bitters,Few Dashes Plain Water
instructions_en: Place sugar cube in old fashioned glass and saturate with bitter, add few dashes of plain water. Muddle until dissolved. Fill the glass with ice cubes and add whiskey. Stir gently.
garnish: Garnish with an orange slice or zest, and a cocktail cherry.
instructions_cocktaildb_en:
Place sugar cube in old fashioned glass and saturate with bitters, add a dash of plain water. Muddle until dissolved.
Fill the glass with ice cubes and add whiskey.

Garnish with orange twist, and a cocktail cherry.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Gin,20 ml Apricot Brandy,15 ml Fresh Orange Juice
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Shake together over ice. Strain into cocktail glass and serve chilled.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Jamaican Rum,15 ml Lime Juice,30 ml Sugar Cane Juice
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients directly in a small tumbler or a typical terracotta glass. NOTE: Add dilution up to taste, it can be given by water, ice or fresh juices.
garnish: Garnish with orange zest.

ingredients_raw: 15 ml Brandy,45 ml Red Tawny Port Wine,10 ml Egg Yolk
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Sprinkle with fresh ground nutmeg.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Shake ingredients together in a mixer with ice. Strain into glass, garnish and serve.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Gin,15 ml Fresh Lime Juice,15 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,30 ml Sugar Syrup,60 ml Cream,30 ml Egg white,3 Dashes Orange Flower Water,2 Drops Vanilla Extract,Soda Water
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients except soda water in a cocktail shaker with ice, Shake for two minutes, double strain in a glass, pour the drink back in the shaker, and hard shake without ice for one minute. Strain into a highball glass, top up with soda. NOTE: The drink was invented by Henry Ramos in 1888, at his bar Meyer's Table d'Hôtel Internationale in New Orleans. The Ramos Fizz was originally shaken for 12 minutes by a crew of 30 bartenders who passed the shaker from one to another.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Scotch Whisky,25 ml Drambuie
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients directly into an old fashioned glass filled with ice. Stir gently.
garnish: Garnish with lemon zest.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour the Scotch and Drambuie into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well. Garnish with the lemon twist.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml Cognac,10 ml Absinthe,1 Sugar Cube,2 Dashes Peychaud's Bitters
instructions_en: Rinse a chilled old-fashioned glass with the absinthe, add crushed ice and set it aside. Stir the remaining ingredients over ice in a mixing glass. Discard the ice and any excess absinthe from the prepared glass, strain the mixed drink into the glass. NOTE: The original recipe changed after the American Civil War, Rye Whiskey substituted Cognac as it became hard to obtain.
garnish: Garnish with lemon zest.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Rinse a chilled old-fashioned glass with the absinthe, add crushed ice, and set it aside. Stir the remaining ingredients over ice and set it aside. Discard the ice and any excess absinthe from the prepared glass, and strain the drink into the glass. Add the lemon peel for garnish.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml Cognac,20 ml Triple Sec,20 ml Fresh Lemon Juice
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well and strain into cocktail glass.

ingredients_raw: 50 ml Cognac,20 ml White Crème de Menthe
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.
garnish: Optional mint leave.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Pour in a mixing glass with ice, stir and strain into a cocktail glass. May also be served on rocks in a rocks glass.

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Old Tom Gin,30 ml Dry Vermouth,1/2 Bar Spoon Maraschino Luxardo,1/4 Bar Spoon of Absinthe,3 Dashes Orange Bitters
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with cherry and lemon zest

ingredients_raw: 30 ml Rye Whiskey,30 ml Cognac,30 ml Sweet Vermouth,1 Bar Spoon Bénédictine,2 Dashes Peychaud's Bitters
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
garnish: Garnish with orange zest and maraschino cherry.

ingredients_raw: 45 ml Bourbon Whiskey,25 ml Fresh Lemon Juice,20 ml Sugar Syrup,20 ml Egg White (Optional)
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well. Strain into cobbler glass. If served “On the rocks”, strain ingredients into an old fashioned glass filled with ice. NOTE: If egg white is used shake little harder to release and incorporate the foam from the egg white.
garnish: Garnish with a half orange slice and maraschino cherry, optionally use orange zest.

ingredients_raw: 40 ml Gin,30 ml Triple Sec,20 ml Fresh Lemon Juice
instructions_en: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
instructions_cocktaildb_en: Add all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well and strain into large cocktail glass.
